title: Enderite Mod
description: The Enderite Mod adds new armor and tools, which are successors of Netherite tools.
body: The Enderite Mod introduces advanced armor and tools that surpass Netherite equipment. Discover Enderite ore in the End, requiring an explosive approach before mining. Smelt the ore in a blast furnace to obtain scraps, which can be combined with diamonds to create Enderite Ingots, similar to Netherite. Utilize these ingots to forge Enderite tools and blocks, all endowed with the power to float above the void. # Requirered APIs ## Architectury API and Cloth Config API [](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) | [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) :---:|:---: https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api | https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config ## FABRIC only: Fabric API [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api # Supported Mod Integrations - https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip - https://modrinth.com/mod/quickshulker (Fabric) # Key Features: - Enderite items possess the void floating ability, defying gravity and remaining afloat above the void, even if a player falls out of the world. They are also fireproof like Netherite. - The Void Floating enchantment bestows the ability to resist the void, enabling survival even after falling out of the world. Enchantment tiers determine the chances of survival in the void damage zone: Tier 1 (33%), Tier 2 (66%), Tier 3 (100%). # Special Items/Blocks: - Enderite Ore: Found exclusively in the End, mineable with a Netherite Pickaxe after being cracked through an explosion (heights 12-48). - Enderite Shulker Box: A safer and larger alternative to the standard shulker box, it withstands the void, is fireproof, and possesses higher blast resistance (up to TNT). Offers a 9x5 inventory. - Enderite Respawn Anchor: Enables respawning in the End, charged with ender pearls. - Enderite Sword: Chargeable with ender pearls in the smithing table, allowing teleportation upon sneak and right-click when fully charged (max charge: 64). - Enderite Shield: Chargeable with ender pearls in the smithing table, permitting teleportation of attackers upon sneak and block when fully charged (max charge: 64). - Enderite Helmet: Prevents Endermen from becoming aggressive when the player looks at them. - Enderite Elytra Chestplate: Combines the Enderite Chestplate with the Elytra, providing both armor and Elytra flight capabilities. - Enderite Bow/Crossbow: Enables shooting at Endermen.
